status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: Part of the Australian Signals Directorate (ASD). See also registry/entity/au/gov/cyber.json for the agency itself.

data.notes: Published by ASD/ACSC. Cybersecurity framework of principles and controls for Australian government and industry to protect systems/data, updated quarterly.

A prioritized maturity-model baseline of eight mitigation strategies (application control, patching, MFA, restricting admin privileges, etc.), mandatory for non-corporate Commonwealth entities and widely adopted voluntarily elsewhere.

Accreditation program certifying independent assessors who evaluate government/cloud-provider systems against the ISM (secid:control/cyber.gov.au/ism); IRAP assessment is a common prerequisite for government cloud accreditation, analogous to FedRAMP 3PAO assessors (US) or ISMAP assessors (Japan).
